mode.name: direct_breakout_observed_close
mode.entry: first breakout per signal bar, filled at triggering 1s close

exit_labels.ProfitLockSL: stop after an MFE threshold moves the stop to entry or a configured positive bps lock
exit_labels.TrailingSL: stop after trailing logic moves the original stop
exit_labels.PT: structure profit-taking after profit protection is armed
exit_labels.TPxATR: full take-profit target at a configured ATR multiple

accounting_assumption: Event path generated with fixed_slippage=2bps/side and commission=0; accounting recomputed as maker entry fee 2bps + market SL/exit fee 4bps.
